data.title: Crypto market liquidates $522M as short sellers take heavy losses amid price surge
data.description:
18-7-2025 – Cryptocurrency markets experienced $522 million in liquidations over the past 24 hours, with short positions bearing the brunt of losses as prices moved higher, according to Coinglass data. Short sellers accounted for $300 million of the total liquidations, significantly outpacing the $222 million in long position losses. The outsized short liquidations suggest traders [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/crypto-market-liquidates-522m-as-short-sellers-take-heavy-losses-amid-price-surge/

data.title: TON Foundation launches native smart contract language
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ton-launch-smart-contract-language/

data.title: DeFi Development Unveils International Treasury Platform Built on Solana
data.description:
TL;DR DeFi Development launches the “DFDV Treasury Accelerator” to build international treasury operations using Solana’s blockchain. The company will hold equity in each regional partner and deliver validator and staking infrastructure to strengthen the network. Solana’s real-world asset (RWA) value has surged 218% in 2025, while its token trades near crucial resistance levels, challenging Ethereum’s.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/defi-development-unveils-international-treasury-platform-built-on-solana/

data.title: U.S. Tariff Revenue Surges in First Half of 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. government data reveals that tariff revenue soared to $87.2 billion in the first half of this year. The increase follows the implementation of reciprocal tariffs by U.S. President Donald Trump's administration in April. June alone saw tariff revenue reach $26.6 billion, quadrupling the usual amount. Analysis by the U.S. Customs and Border Protection indicates that the 10% baseline tariff has generated over $17.7 billion, while specific tariffs on the automotive sector have contributed more than $10.7 billion.

Estimates from Yale University's Budget Laboratory show that as of Sunday, the overall average effective tariff rate in the U.S. has reached 20.6%, the highest since 1910. Additionally, the proportion of tariffs in the total value of U.S. imports is rapidly increasing. A new round of reciprocal tariffs set to take effect on August 1 is expected to further elevate these figures.

Bitcoin DeFi has seen a massive 1,971% rise in total value locked (TVL) between December 2024 and July 2025, from $307 million to $6. 36 billion, according to Arch Network. The post Bitcoin DeFi TVL Surges from $307 Million to $6.

data.title: Web3 smart layer W3.io completes $7 million seed round led by Blockchange Ventures
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 smart layer W3.io announced the completion of a $7 million seed round of financing, led by Blockchange Ventures, with participation from Framework Ventures, Arrington Capital and other institutions.
The alliance is building a programmable intelligent automation network Prodigy Network, which aims to lower the threshold for enterprises to use blockchain technology. W3.io CEO said the project is committed to developing plug-and-play business solutions covering global micropayments, mortgages and other scenarios. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Blockskye Completes $15.8 Million Series C Financing, Led by Blockchange
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Blockskye, which builds blockchain infrastructure for business travel, has completed a $15.8 million Series C financing, led by Blockchange, with participation from United Airlines Venture Capital, Lightspeed Faction, KSV Global, Lasagna, Litquidity Ventures, Longbrook Ventures and TFJ Capital. This round of financing uses a priced equity transaction and comes with token warrants. Blockskye is also preparing to launch a new payment product. (The Block)

data.title: Altcoins Reclaim Key Technical Level – Can Momentum Sustain This Time?
data.description:
Altcoins are flashing fresh bullish signals as momentum returns to the broader crypto market. Leading the charge is Ethereum, which has surged above the $3,450 level, marking its highest price since mid-January. The breakout signals growing confidence among bulls and is sparking renewed interest across the altcoin sector. Related Reading: Bitcoin Retail Demand Rebounds – $0–$10K Transfer Volume Turns Positive Many altcoins have posted impressive gains in recent days, bouncing sharply from their April lows
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/altcoins-reclaim-key-technical-level-can-momentum-sustain-this-time/
